author: Cursive
description: Trading journal with templates, trade tracking, imports, and reviews. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Cursivez
manifest.description: Trading journal with templates, trade tracking, imports, and reviews.
manifest.name: Journalit

name: Journalit

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# **[1.7.12] - 2026/06/23**

Small update regarding some fixes and improvements.

### **Best Hours Analytics Upgrade**

![Best Hours](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/38a97d3d-4096-4617-99a8-bb6c67aedc9c)
The Home Best Hours widget is now more actionable.

- **30-minute time windows** — Compares practical entry-time buckets like 9:30-10:00 vs 10:30-11:00 instead of broad time ranges
- **Sample-aware ranking** — Avoids calling a tiny sample the “best” window too early

### **Dashboard Hourly Performance Controls**

The Trading Dashboard hourly chart now gives you more control over time-of-day analysis.

- **Bucket size selector** — View hourly performance in 15m, 30m, or 60m buckets
- **Metric selector** — Switch between Total and Average performance

### **Trade Import Restore + Multi-Vault Reliability**

![Trade Backup](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5420b6d4-234c-4a9c-a054-c75573c45a96)
Trade Import is now more reliable when using multiple vaults or restoring missing local trade notes.

- **Restore missing imported trades** — Recover deleted or missing local trade notes from backend imports without creating duplicate backend trades
- **Multi-vault import support** — Project the same backend imported trades into another vault more safely
- **Deletion tracking** — Local deletions are acknowledged in the background without blocking note deletion

### **Expired Login Handling**

Backend sync now handles expired sessions more cleanly.

### **Home Widget Settings Fixes**

Compact Home widgets are easier to configure.

- **Scrollable settings panels** — Goal Progress and Top Setups settings can be edited without resizing the widget first
- **Cancel restores saved settings** — Unsaved Goal Progress and Top Setups changes are discarded correctly
- **Cleaner action buttons** — Top Setups save/cancel buttons now match the Goal Progress styling

### **DRC Session Mistakes Dropdown Fix**

The Session Mistakes selector in Review V2 is now easier to use when other widgets sit directly below it.

### **Trade Form Commission Fixes**

Manual and automatic commissions now behave more reliably when creating or editing trades.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# **[1.7.11] - 2026/06/19**

Trade import fixes, MetaTrader SL/TP sync, new Trade Log filters, and quality-of-life updates.

### **Profit Target + Account Goals**

![Account Goals](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/85cefcf1-7217-4371-9f29-1b72c401154c)

- New Profit Target widget for account profit targets
- P&L Target, Trade Count, and Win Rate goals can use selected accounts
- Home account filters now apply to goal progress too

### **MetaTrader Stop Loss + Take Profit Sync**

Synced MetaTrader trades can now bring in stop loss and take-profit data.

- Take profits can be saved as multiple targets with close percentages

### **Trade Import Improvements**

Trade Import should behave better when files contain duplicates, updates, or trades that need review.

### **New Trade Log Filters**

- Filter by Reviewed or Unreviewed
- Filter by direction: Long/Call or Short/Put
- Click the Home Unreviewed Trades widget to open Trade Log with unreviewed trades selected

### **Trade Note Reading View + PDF Export**

- Trade Notes now render more reliably outside edit mode.
- Trade Notes now show up in Obsidian PDF exports

### **Vietnamese Language Support**

Journalit now includes Vietnamese.

### **Automatic Commission Fixes**

Automatic commission rules are now visible while editing a trade, instead of only showing up after save.

### **More Fixes**

- Sidebar edit mode: drag the whole row, with better top/bottom reordering
- Onboarding Explore cards now fit narrow Obsidian panes better
- Home Regular/Backtest dropdown clicks behave more consistently
- Key Levels priority dropdown styling is fixed
- New review notes no longer auto-generate tags
- Internal cache/index files moved out of the vault root `.journalit/` folder
  _this may cause your first load after this update to be slower than usual_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# **[1.7.10] - 2026/06/15**

Obsidian Review Fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# **[1.7.9] - 2026/06/15**

Prepared Journalit for Obsidian plugin submission with a bunch of fixes, cleanup, and minor UI polish.

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.8] - 2026/06/11**

Copy trading, better media support, new dashboard metrics, automatic commissions, and a lot of accuracy/UI fixes.

### **Account-Level Copy Trading**

![Copy Account](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bc8b0bdd-1fe4-4681-b937-121648c074d5)
Track copied account performance without duplicating trade notes.

- **Copy periods + multipliers** — Configure base accounts, copy multipliers, and historical copy periods
  _You can edit existing accounts to change to copy accounts or create new accounts as copy accounts_

### **Excalidraw + Vault Media Support**

Add vault images, wikilinks, embeds, and Excalidraw drawings to trade media.

### **Automatic Ticker Commissions**

Configure commission rules once per ticker/instrument and per account
_Access via Settings → Customization → Tickers / Instruments_

### **Dashboard Metric Improvements**

- **Hourly Performance widget** — New dashboard chart showing P&L by hour of day
- **MAE/MFE top metrics** — Optional heat and excursion stats for winners and losers
- **Drawdown percent fix** — Drawdown percentages now use account capital/balance basis instead of peak realized P&L

### **Quick Trade Imports + New Broker**

- **Quick Trade Import flow** — Import your favourited broker into your account faster using the new modal
  _Access via `Ctrl+P "Quick import"` and/or set a hotkey for it_
- **New broker format** - We now support TopStepX imports

### **Trade Entry Quality of Life**

New trade forms now keep the date filled but leave time fields blank.
_If left blank, Journalit saves the current time when you submit._

### **More Fixes + Polish**

- Account Breakdown now sorts accounts by PnL
- Better Review widget headers, star styling, and Layout Builder wording
- Trade Log, Home account filters, Key Events dropdowns, and loading skeletons got cleanup fixes
- Account charts now have cleaner axis scaling, zero handling, and balance coloring
- Minor UI alignment fixes across icons, badges, forms, calendar sidebar, Key Levels, and Trade Log controls

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.7] - 2026/05/16**

Weekly review improvements, plus hotfixes for trade note loading, Review V2 syncing, and dashboard partial-exit metrics.

### **Weekly Review DRC Improvements**

![Weekly DRC Review](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f6d87ebd-5be0-4c8a-a4fd-8e7b33cda2fd)
Review weekday DRCs faster from your Weekly Review.

- **Clickable DRC names** — The weekday DRC name now opens the related DRC, replacing the separate open button
- **Mark reviewed from weekly review** — Mark or unmark each weekday DRC directly inside the weekly context widget
- **Sticky headers** — Review actions stay available while reading longer DRC sections

### **Fixes**

- **Trade note loading** — Fixes trade notes opening as raw markdown/frontmatter instead of the Journalit trade UI
- **Review widget sync** — Keeps goals, checklists, grades, and weekly key events synced across Reading view and Live Preview
- **Nested DRC widgets** — Prevents recursive previous-day context widgets inside embedded DRC context sections
- **Weekly DRC context placement** — Weekly DRC context now only renders in Weekly Review notes
- **Review header layout** — Keeps the reviewed indicator aligned on narrow panes and mobile widths
- **Dashboard partial exits** — Improves monthly Net P&L, Recent Trades, and Weekday Performance in exit-date mode

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.6] - 2026/05/13**

Review context, calendar upgrades, account visibility, multi-currency reviews, and reliability fixes.

### **Revamped Calendar**

![Calendar](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f1f11d9c-fb43-4614-b1bd-90dcf01da09a)

- **Better navigation** — Navigate months from the header
- **Review shortcuts** — Open month, quarter, and year reviews from headers
- **Calendar sidebar** — Dedicated sidebar calendar view
  _`Ctrl + P` "Open calendar sidebar" to open_

### **Review Context**

![Inherited Context](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/37de2d50-9119-453e-bb59-625b54aba597)

- **Review fields** — Create review-only custom fields
- **Inherited context** — Pull monthly/weekly context into DRCs
  _Access via the customisation tab in the settings_

### **Review Improvements**

![Daily Review](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9e652379-2365-4a12-bc21-666828395bd2)

- **Add news from DRCs** — Add key events/news from the DRC
- **Daily Reviews by Weekday** — Show selected DRC sections by weekday

### **Review + Accounts**

![Account breakdown](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8163d11c-eefb-4cc7-8cc3-28d83449e6d9)

- **Account Breakdown widget** — Compare review performance by account
- **Smarter review trade tables** — Cleaner account/date columns and tooltips
- **Better chart tooltips** — Tooltips no longer clip inside Obsidian panes

### **Multi-Currency Reviews**

- **Converted aggregates** — Review charts/widgets use converted values
- **Conversion warnings** — Unsupported currencies are excluded and shown in tooltips
- **More coverage** — Conversion metadata on more P&L surfaces

### **Add Tags in Trade Log**

- **Batch Add Tags** — Apply tags to multiple selected trades at once

### **More Fixes**

- Recent Trades respect Exit Date
- Review widgets scope correctly in exit-date mode
- Calendar grouping handles exit dates/cutoffs better
- Missed Trades empty state is more compact
- Switching review templates no longer blanks notes
- Review grade buttons no longer jump scroll position
- Dashboard loading, scrolling, and resizing are smoother
- Trade Log tree modes support horizontal scrolling
- Account deletion is more reliable
- Deleted account types no longer reappear in Account Dashboard
- Break-even classification uses consistent balance lookup
- MT accounts can be unlinked

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.5] - 2026/05/03**

Previous-period comparisons, previous DRC context, custom field improvements, and analytics fixes.

### **Previous-Period Comparisons**

![Prev compare](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/00215281-263a-494b-9095-a0ef48a2b359)
Dashboard top metrics and review stats now show rows like `vs prev` and `past 30d`.

- **Date-aware comparisons** — Week, month, quarter, and year compare elapsed time against the previous period

### **Previous Trading Day Context Widget**

![Prev DRC](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0082352e-f087-445f-9915-1856102b857d)
Add previous DRC context to Daily Review Checklist templates.
_Access via Layout Builder → DRC templates → Previous Trading Day Context_

- **Section selection** — Choose which previous DRC sections to show
- **Trading-day aware** — Uses trading-day navigation and nearest-earlier fallback

### **Custom Trade Fields UX**

_Access via Settings → Customisation → Custom Trade Fields_

- **Field reordering** — Control custom field order in the trade form
- **Cleaner settings UI** — Cleaner hierarchy, empty states, editor layout, and actions
- **Better Advanced tab** — Clearer ordering and setup path when empty

### **More Accurate Trade Analytics**

Partial exits now appear in exit-date analytics before the full trade is closed.

- **Partial-exit P&L** — Realized partial exits now show in calendar, charts, and account analytics
- **Trade Log Risk $ fix** — Risk $ derives from stop loss, entry, and size when no manual risk is stored

### **Account Dashboard Fixes**

- **EOD trailing drawdown** — Drawdown used now uses the active trailed floor
- **Account type deletion** — Deleted account types no longer reappear

### **Position Size Calculator Command**

Assign your own Obsidian hotkey for the position size calculator.
_Access via Obsidian Settings → Hotkeys → Journalit: Open position size calculator_

### **Other fixes**

- French and German translation quality
- Home scrolling fix
- Dashboard metric edit polish
- Home weekly currency display
- Sidebar currency search

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.4] - 2026/04/30**

Privacy Mode, full French/German translations, weekly review upgrades, and a batch of dashboard/layout fixes.

### **Weekly Review Improvements**

![Key Levels](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/32916d9a-2acf-4e68-84c8-85332c29e6d2)
More planning tools for weekly review notes.

- **Weekly Pre-Checklist** — Add a repeatable checklist to weekly reviews, with default checklist settings and per-review saved state
- **Inherited Key Levels** — Monthly levels can flow into weekly reviews, and monthly/weekly levels can flow into DRCs
- **Inline Key Level Editing** — Edit support and resistance levels directly inside review widgets
- **Default Event Notes** — Save reusable notes for events like FOMC, CPI, or NFP and auto-fill them in weekly reviews

### **Privacy Mode**

Hide sensitive trading and account values across Journalit.
_Access via Settings → General → Data Management & Privacy → Privacy Mode_

### **French + German Translations**

Journalit now has complete French and German language coverage.

### **Guide Improvements**

Interactive onboarding guides now have Back navigation.

### **More Fixes**

- Trading Score excellent-state color no longer depends on your Obsidian accent color
- CSV Import scroll behavior restored after view layout changes
- Trade log columns polish
- Dashboard + layout polish
- Date selector spacing
- CFD PnL rounding fix
- Position Size risk decimals

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.3] - 2026/04/26**
Trade Log improvements, review template upgrades, navigation fixes, and dashboard polish.

### **Review Template Markdown Presets**
Add reusable text or questions to Markdown Zone widgets in Layout Builder.
*Access via Layout Builder → Markdown Zone*

Preset text now appears in newly created review notes, while existing answers are preserved when switching templates.

### **Trade Log Price Move Column**
See how far each trade moved from entry to exit.

### **Navigation Sidebar Recovery**
Added a dedicated command to reopen the Journalit navigation sidebar if it gets closed.
*Access via command palette → Journalit: Open navigation sidebar*

### **Navigation Behavior Fixes**
More predictable tab behavior across Journalit.
- **Sidebar setting isolation** — Sidebar tab behavior now only affects sidebar-originated navigation
- **Trade Log tab behavior** — Trades and review notes opened from Trade Log now open in new tabs as expected

### **Dashboard Metric Polish**
Dashboard percentage values now display as lightweight inline context instead of pill-style badges.

### **Home Quick Links Fix**
When all Home quick links are hidden, the empty quick-links row is now hidden in normal mode while restore guidance remains available in Customise mode.

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.2] - 2026/04/22**
Navigation, drawdown analytics, and trade journaling improvements, with major quality-of-life fixes across dashboard and filters.

### **Navigation Sidebar + Journalit search Bar**
![Sidebar](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f5c2727d-f0e0-4643-a125-b89a63c2be7a)
![Search Bar](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3187b34-ff76-45e7-a285-243d7781c684)
- **Journalit sidebar** - Customizable sidebar making it easier to navigate throughout the plugin.
- **Search Bar** - Easily search for trades and review notes from the sidebar.

### **New Drawdown Widgets & Metrics**
![Drawdown widgets](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b0614747-647a-415d-ac76-1b0b0b086d0c)
- **Long and Short Drawdown Charts** - Easily compare your long and short drawdown periods.
- **More in-depth drawdpwn tooltips** - Drawdown charts now have more detailed tooltips.
- **New Drawdown Metrics** - Added Drawdown Episodes, Time in drawdown, Avg recovery time, Longest Drawdown

### **Exit Date Analytics for Swing Traders**
Choose whether dashboard and home analytics use entry date or exit date for closed trades.

### **Per-Trade Dividends**
Track multiple dividend events on a trade.

### **Percentage-Based Break-Even Thresholds**
Classify break-even using account-current-balance percentages.

### **Live Balance Calibration**
Added a separate live balance adjustment so broker-reported balance can be matched without distorting deposits or withdrawals.

### **Dashboard Percentage Metrics**
Added percentage context to dashboard Avg Win/Loss and Largest Win/Loss metrics.

### **Account Trade-Type Filter**
Added regular/backtest filtering to the Account Dashboard.

### **Contextual Onboarding Guides**
Added guided onboarding across the main Journalit views.
*Even if you are a pretty experienced user, I recommend going through these quick guides. Maybe you'll find something new.*

### **Fixes**
- Exit size precision
- Backtest trade naming
- Quarterly filter
- Max R accounts stop loss
- MAE/MFE aligned

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.1] - 2026/04/13**
Trade Log upgrades, review workflow improvements, dashboard insights, and under-the-hood trade reliability work.

### **Trade Log Upgrades**
![Trade Log](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d7bd2713-3149-409f-91b6-1e1f0870c889)
See more context and performance data directly in Trade Log.
- **Max R + Return % columns** — New columns for faster trade performance review
- **MetaTrader comment column** — View broker comments directly in Trade Log
- **Custom field tooltip polish** — Long custom field values no longer overflow tooltips

### **Review Workflow Improvements**
![Review](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d768c140-825a-47be-ac5c-65052eeb4e2b)
- **Added backtest review widgets** — Try out the new backtest trades widget in your review notes
- **Improved Missed trades widget** — A lot more useful and informative
- **Smarter review defaults** — Review stats now handle regular vs backtest trade types more cleanly by default
- **Improved trade type filters** — Better trade type filter arrangement and clearer behavior across Trade Log, Home, Dashboard, and reviews

### **New Trading Dashboard Metrics**
Added 2 new streak metrics for Best and Worst streaks

### **Account Dashboard Withdrawal Details**
- **Monthly withdrawal breakdown tooltip** — Hover to see monthly withdrawal details directly from the dashboard

+ a lot of smaller fixes
+ been working on quite a few performance improvements that should make things feel smoother

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.7.0] - 2026/04/02**
Custom trade fields, Home account filtering and manual trade/import fixes

## **Custom Trade Fields Across the App**
![Custom Field Columns](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/92948032-db3c-4f15-88ca-e99b79846a0d)
Custom fields are now much more useful.
- **Trade Log custom fields** — Add custom columns to the trade log for your custom fields
- **Custom field filtering** — Filter the Trade Log, Trading Dashboard and Review notes by custom field values
*You can only filter `dropdown` and `multi-select` custom field types*
*You can add your custom columns at the bottom of the Available Columns in the Trade Log Column Settings*

## **Trade Note Cleanup + Display Custom Fields**
- **Trade note custom fields section** — Trade notes now show custom fields in a cleaner dedicated section
- **Cleaner trade note layout** — Remove the duplicated bottom trade details table while keeping key metrics and thesis visible
*this is not the trade note revamp, that is still WIP*

## **Home Account Filter**
![Account Filter](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d11f7995-bc8d-4129-906e-0447b50451ec)
Scope the full Home view to the accounts you actually want to see.

## **Trade Form + Currency Improvements**
Manual trade entry is more reliable, especially around account and currency handling.
- **Zero-account trade form UX** — Better behavior when no accounts exist yet, with fewer loading/state issues
- **CFD-specific symbol currency support** — Manual trades now handle CFD currency tickers more accurately

## **Import + Note Formatting Fixes**
Several quality-of-life fixes improve CSV import flexibility and note correctness.
- **Direct PnL imports without quantity** — Manual direct PnL CSV imports no longer require a quantity mapping
- **Thesis formatting fix** — Multiline thesis content now saves and renders correctly without leaking YAML formatting markers into notes

## **Settings + Event Reliability**
A couple of correctness fixes tighten up settings and internal state updates.
- **Customization reset fix** — Restore customization reset defaults and related widget processor cleanup
- **Event settings cleanup** — More reliable persistence and cleanup when editing event settings

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.6.11] - 2026/03/25**
Trade type switching fixes, Obsidian compatibility hardening, and public submission polish.

### **Trade Type Switching Fixes**
Switch regular, missed, and backtest trades more reliably without notes disappearing or getting stuck in the wrong state.
- **Cleaner type conversions** — Prevent stale frontmatter and inconsistent routing when switching between regular, missed, and backtest trades
- **Immediate re-rendering** — Converted notes now refresh more reliably right after the type changes
- **Trade log stability** — Avoid invisible or duplicated notes after cross-type edits

### **Obsidian Compatibility Hardening**
A broad pass to align more closely with Obsidian plugin expectations and improve day-to-day reliability.
- **Safer note updates** — More editor-aware file mutation handling for active notes and safer background file changes
- **View restoration improvements** — Preserve Journalit views across plugin reloads instead of detaching them
- **UI consistency polish** — Reviewer-visible UI text and behavior have been cleaned up for better consistency

### **More Fixes**
- Recharts tooltip typings were stabilized

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.6.10] - 2026/03/19**
MetaTrader HTML import support, more accurate risk handling for missed/backtest trades, and backend sync cleanup.

### **JDR / MetaTrader HTML Import**
Import MT4-style HTML statements from JDR / MetaTrader exports.
*Access via CSV Import → Broker selector → JDR Securities Limited*

### **Missed + Backtest Trade Risk Fixes**
More reliable risk and R-multiple handling for missed trades, backtests, and stop-loss-based calculations.

### **Documentation Overhaul**
The docs have been completely overhauled for better readability and a cleaner overall design.
*View them at https://journalit.co/docs*

### Small fixes that improve consistency across the app.
- **Formatting and currency polish**
- **Backend Sync Cleanup**

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.6.9] - 2026/03/14**
Contract spec fixes, dashboard stability improvements, and safer trade sync behavior.

## **CFD Contract Size + PnL Fixes**
CFD trades now handle contract specs much more reliably across the trade form, saved instruments, and calculations.

## **Trade Form Instrument Spec Improvements**
Instrument settings are now more stable across futures, forex, and CFD workflows.

## **Dashboard Layout Stability**
The dashboard widget grid is now more resilient to bad saved layout data.

## **Custom Field Validation Fix**
Custom dropdown and multiselect fields now handle numeric option values correctly.
- **Numeric custom options supported** — Prevent valid numeric select values from being rejected in trade forms

## **Trade Sync Access Fixes**
Auto-sync behavior is now stricter and less noisy.

+ some other more minor changes + fixes

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **[1.6.8] - 2026/03/02**
Major CSV import upgrades, new review/dashboard analytics, and reliability fixes across trade workflows.

## **Migrate your journals from Excel to Journalit!**
*Access via CSV Import → upload `.xlsx` / `.xls` files*
- **Custom Fields Mapping** - Map your imports to custom fields you created
- **Direct PnL support** — Import PnL values directly when your export provides them
- **Embedded image handling** — Review and attach images extracted from Excel exports
- **Other fees mapping** — Map/import additional fee columns during manual import

## **Scalper Demon Tracker Workflow**
Workflow support for tracking session mistakes with the new review tooling.
Use the new session mistakes widget in your DRC.

## **Dashboard Analytics Expansion**
More ways to analyse performance at a glance.
![Weekday widget](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/84166f8c-c4fd-4929-8f9f-3668f0c6fdf9)
- **Weekday performance widget** — Analyse results by day of week with persistent metric toggle
![Avg RR](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7b97e20a-9fe4-4282-8d7c-443c3b9d3040)
- **Payoff + Avg RR metrics** — Added payoff and R-based average RR metrics to dashboard metrics

## **Home + Settings Improvements**
Daily workflow improvements for layout and planning.
![Top Breakdown](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f03d948a-a788-491a-a5dd-85c2def367ae)
- **Top Breakdown option** — Home Top Setups widget can now be configured as Top Breakdown. You can now see Top Setups, Asset Types, Tags, and/or Tickers
- **Quick Links positioning** — Move the quick links buttons to the top or bottom of the home view. Click the gear icon in the top right and then click the arrow to move it.
- **Recurring goals/checklist editing** — Inline edit + reorder controls for recurring goals and checklist items

## **More Fixes**
- Removed unintended browser title tooltips in key onboarding/settings areas for cleaner UX
- ATAS commission reconciliation
- Remember last-used broker/account choices in import flow
- Stop-loss risk now respects asset-specific behavior in form + trade log
- Prevent crash when option values are non-string

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **1.6.7**
New CSV import support, import accuracy fixes, and dashboard metric improvements.

## **Trading Technologies (TT) CSV Import**
Import trades from Trading Technologies exports.
*Access via CSV Import → Broker selector → Trading Technologies*

## **Rithmic CSV Import**
First-class support for Rithmic exports.
*Access via CSV Import → Broker selector → Rithmic*

## **Import Accuracy Improvements**
More reliable timestamps and symbol handling across brokers.
- **Timezone-safe imports** — Prevent timezone-shifted timestamps when creating trades from imports
- **FXReplay CME symbol fix** — Resolve CME symbol import failures and normalize futures parsing

## **Account Growth Metrics Fix**
More accurate growth stats when you deposit/withdraw.

## **Dashboard + Calendar Polish**
Small UI/analytics changes that improve day-to-day readability.
- **Break-even styling** — Cleaner break-even visuals in the performance calendar
- **Break-even range classification** — Correctly classifies trades within the break-even range in Trade Note + dashboard widgets

## **More Fixes**
- ATAS Journal imports now include execution commissions

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **1.6.6**
Small hotfix release for account page stability.

## **Fixes**
- Fixed account modal field style scoping
- Improved account page visual consistency

@Update Alerts

releases.author: Cursivez
releases.description:
# **Journalit is out of beta (1.6.5)**

Thank you to everyone who has helped test Journalit over the past few months. Your bug reports, feedback, and feature ideas have made a real difference.

Journalit is now out of beta, and paid plans are now available.

## **Freemium model**
At launch, the following are Pro features:
- **CSV import**
- **Trade Sync** (MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5)

Everything else remains free, including manual trade entry, dashboards, review notes and templates, account management, and the trade log.

## **Pricing (standard)**
- **$18/month**
- **$180/year**

## **Installation and updates**
Journalit will continue to be installed and updated via **BRAT** for now.

---

# **What’s new:**
New import options, smoother first-run experience, and more accurate stats across the dashboard and home widgets.

## **XLSX / XLS Imports**
Import broker exports without converting to CSV first.
- **Excel support** - Upload `.xlsx` / `.xls` files directly in the trade importer

## **Onboarding Revamp + Preview-First CSV Import**
Redesigned the onboarding. `Ctrl + P` and search "Replay Onboarding" to view it

## **Better Error UX + Support Reports**
If you have any import or sync errors, you can now easily copy a report and send it to #bugs

## **Breakeven Win Rate + Home Widgets Accuracy**
Breakeven trades are now handled consistently across the app.
- **Win rate fix** - Breakevens no longer count in the win-rate denominator
- **Streak fix** - Current streaks no longer break on breakeven trades
- **Weekly summary visuals** - Breakeven days render as neutral (not “green days”)

## **Support for themes**
Journalit now adapts to your themes styling

+ quite a bit of cleanup and fixes
